documents.title: RHS-Brochure
documents.content:
1
AGITATOR
DRYERS
Made in Germany
BESTE TROCKNUNGSTECHNIK
AGRAR .
 KOMMUNAL . INDUSTRIE
®
Ideal for drying liquid manure, fermentation residue,
sewage sludge and industrial biomass.
2
With the emergence of biogas plants at the
start of the 1990s, farmers were confronted
with the need to cost-effectively and
usefully dispose of fermentation residue,
whether liquid or solid residue, produced by
the fermentation of biomass. The operators
of sewage treatment plants have faced
this challenge for some time, as they were
unable to store increasing volumes of
sewage sludge for long periods of time on
their land.
Due to the high content of NPK (nitrogen,
phosphorus, potassium) substances in
this wet residue, it was obvious that these
substrates could be used as first-class
fertilizer on farmland. As sewage sludge
often contains pollutants, this method of
disposal is now legally prohibited.
READ ON FOR MORE INFORMATION
ABOUT THE FOLLOWING
WHY DRYERS? THE TASK 3
AN OPTIMUM DRYING PROCESS 5
THE PRODUCT 6
THE RHINO PRODUCT RANGE 11
RHINO AGRICULTURE 12
RHINO MUNICIPAL 13
RHINO INDUSTRY 14
FROM RESIDUE TO RAW MATERIAL 15
RHINO CUSTOMER SERVICE 15
THE DRYING EXPERTS 16
The following applies to all biomass: the
less water it contains, the cheaper it is to
transport. Professional drying reduces the
weight and volume of the material. With
sewage sludge, drying also increases its
calorific value.
WHY DRYERS?
THE TASK
RHS: THE DRYING EXPERTS
2 3
When that’s the solution:
• Determine excess heat
• Use eligibility
• saving of storage space, emergency
 cooling function and transport costs
• marketing of fertilisers or fuel as a
 drying product
Building a sustainable
profitable new business!
BESTE TROCKNUNGSTECHNIK
AGRAR .
 KOMMUNAL . INDUSTRIE
®
4
The material to be dried is fed to the dryer
in a liquid or solid consistency. The integral
scale underneath the drying tank and a
fill level sensor monitor the fill level in the
dryer. Two horizontal agitators operate in
the drying tank, rotating slowly counterclockwise (2-4 revolutions per minute) and
continuously mixing the material being dried.
Fresh air is drawn in by the supply air fan
and then forced through the heat exchanger.
An external heat source feeds the heat
exchanger with hot water.
The air, thus heated, is blown through
the air duct and through the slotted tray
(see illustration on next page) into the
material to be dried. The slotted tray
guarantees the low-resistance supply of the
drying air into the material being dried. By
continuously mixing the material to be dried,
the drying air can gently flow through the
material, at the same time contacting a large
surface area, which effectively transfers
moisture to the drying air.
The maximum volume in the drying tank
is attained when the fill level reaches the
agitator shafts. Once this maximum fill level
has been reached and the material being
dried has attained the pre-set degree of
drying, a third of this maximum fill level is
discharged. Two thirds remain as the base
volume in the drying tank. Small amounts of
fresh material, still to be dried, are gradually
added to this dried base volume of material.
The fill level thus increases again to its
maximum fill level. Constant mixing with
the addition of fresh material to be dried
produces a homogeneous mass that does not
stick.
The drying process is therefore continuous,
while the discharge of material is
discontinuous.
THE SOLUTION:
AGITATED DRYING
“High-time” drying chamber
and container in the plant
4
5
That’s great!
...what does the machine look like?
AGITATOR DRYERS
LOW-WEAR.
DURABLE.
BE
STE TROCKNUNGST
ECHNIK
AG
RAR
.
 KOMMUNAL
. INDUSTRIE
®
6
Agitator drives
Drying tank,
here 7 m long
Filter bags with vibration
mechanism for automatic cleaning
Exhaust air pipe
Air intake filter
with upstream fan
Hot water supply
(VL/RL) with water pump
Agitators
Slotted tray
Hot air duct
(optional with
automatic cleaning)
Feed for biomass, solid or liquid
(e.g. liquid manure, fermentation residue,
sewage sludge etc.)
THE PRODUCT
6 7
BESTE TROCKNUNGSTECHNIK
AGRAR .
 KOMMUNAL . INDUSTRIE
®
Made in Germany
I like it!
Container construction
weatherproof
Dosage of H2S04 (20%)
for the binding of ammonia
in the drying material
Hydraulic unit and
sensors
Discharge screw,
water content sensor
Recording of weight by
weighing cells among the
feet
Control cabinet with
control technology
Heat exchanger unit
including circulating pump
8
9
The exhaust air is continuously cleaned
through a dust filter system fitted to the
drying tank. The dust and odours bound to
it remain “suspended” on the filter hoses,
forming what is known as filter cake. This
filter cake grows during the drying process,
increasing the air resistance and raising
the back pressure within the drying tank.
Automatic filter cleaning is triggered as
soon as this back pressure reaches a defined
threshold. This involves briefly lowering the
performance of the fan and vibrating the
filter hoses. The filter cake then drops back
into the drying tank and is mixed here with
the material that is still moist.
The exhaust air scrubbed by the filter hoses
and laden with water is discharged into
the environment through the exhaust air
chamber and exhaust air pipe. The fibre
length of the material to be dried may not
exceed 5 cm to ensure the effectiveness
of the filter hoses.
EXHAUST AIR HANDLING
THROUGH INNOVATIVE DUST
FILTER TECHNOLOGY
The dried material is discharged out of the
drying tank once the upper fill level and
the specified degree of drying have been
reached. The degree of drying is determined
by a humidity sensor and can be set at
between 70% and 95% dry matter (DM)
content. The fill levels are monitored using
the integrated scale in conjunction with the
fill level sensors.
The agitators continuously blend and mix
the material, with their conveying elements
(paddles) simultaneously ensuring horizontal
circulation of the material to be dried in the
drying tank, and thus homogeneous dried
material.
This functionality ensures that the fill level
is kept at a certain level along the entire
tank, with the result that a discharge screw
fitted at the front end is enough to empty the
drying tank. The discharge process continues
until the tank contains material with the
pre-set residual moisture level or the
minimum fill level has been reached.
DISCHARGE OF THE DRIED
MATERIAL
8
9 View into the drying tank
with the two agitators
I’m truly amazed!
10 11
CONTROL TECHNOLOGY
The complex control of the drying process
is displayed in an easily understandable
and user-friendly manner, thanks to the
innovative software and visualisation.
The hardware consists of standard industrial
components with a long-term availability of
spare parts.
All process data is registered and recorded
continuously. All key functions can be
analysed and correspondingly optimised
using graphs. The control system guarantees
efficient drying at all times.
Our RHINO dryers come in five sizes and four versions.
RHINO
3000
RHINO
5000
RHINO
7000
RHINO
1
0000
for the Agricultural, Municipal and Industrial sectors
.
THE RHINO
®
PRODUCT RANGE
The different mass of biomass (specific
weight) in drying means that an optimised
product for fermentation residue or sewage
sludge is only possible with varying and
hence adapted internal equipment.
Our RHINOs first and foremost need the
space to fit their respective dimensions
(see table).
INSTALLATION AREA:
HOW MUCH SPACE DOES A RHINO DRYER NEED?
Our drying machine always arrives on site
well packaged – actually better than that –
solidly incorporated in a conventional sea
container measuring 12.20 m long, 2.50 m
wide and 2.90 m high.
With a top-mounted filter system, the RHINO
dryer has a height of 5,73 m, and with an
exhaust air pipe this even rises to 12 m.
Our RHINO is therefore weatherproof and
space-saving – installation outdoors is ideal.
There is no need to construct an additional
building to house it!
10 11
The access doors at both ends need two to
three metres of space to allow access for
maintenance and repairs. The containers
require a concrete slab or a strip foundation.
*(excluding exhaust air pipe)
Made in Germany
Well, I’d like one of those!
Connections on site
• Electricity
• Internet (network)
• Water supply and return
• Supply drying substrate
• Output
Length Width Height*
RHINO 3000 12,20 2,50 5,73
RHINO 5000 12,20 2,50 5,73
RHINO 7000 12,20 2,50 5,73
RHINO 10000 19,20 2,50 5,73
Dimensions in m
RHINO
®
7000
RHINO
® Agrar 7.000
12
RHINO®
AGRICULTURE
An adjustable 20% sulfuric acid solution is added
to the liquid manure and/or fermentation residue
through a hose system. Sulfuric acid and ammonia
have very high reactivity (affinity). The ammonia
contained in the dry substrate combines in the
exhaust air stream until the filter bags are fully filled
with the instilled sulfuric acid to form ammonium
sulfate.
As the filter cake that forms on the filter bags is
returned to the drying tank at regular intervals by
automatic filter cleaning, all the nutrients of the
dry substrate are retained in the discharged dried
material.
This produces a biological fertilizer without the
production of an ammonium sulfate solution that
requires an additional collection tank.
EXHAUST AIR TREATMENT BY CONVERTING
AMMONIA INTO AMMONIUM SULFATE
13
RHINO®
 MUNICIPAL
When drying sewage sludge, the exhaust air is scrubbed by a chemical exhaust air scrubber, in which
the exhaust air flow is pressed through a wall of water acidified with sulfuric acid. This washes the
ammonia out of the exhaust air and it is collected as ammonium sulfate solution in a downstream
container. Apart from the occurrence of ammonia, authorities can also impose requirements
governing the odours, depending on the location. In this case, the additional construction of a
biofilter to comply with odour intensities seems likely.
EXHAUST AIR TREATMENT BY A CHEMICAL EXHAUST AIR SCRUBBER
System for drying sewage sludge, Plattling (Bavaria)
12 13
“The first dryer that I really trust.” (Biogas customer, 2016)
(Sewage sludge customer, 2017)
It could look like
this in our company...
“Impressive: it runs just like it looks!”
Biogas Rehau GmbH & Co. KG,
Monheim (Bavaria)
Johannes Miermann Biogas, Bottrop-Kirchhellen (NRW)
50 m
5 m
FEEDING CONTAINERS RHINO MUNICIPAL 10.000 EXHAUST AIR SCRUBBERS
Space-saving construction of a complete sewage sludge drying plant,
Material throughput up to 8000 t/a
14 15
Reterra West GmbH & Co. KG
drying of residues from the bioton,
Coesfeld (NRW)
RHINO®
 INDUSTRY
The RHINO agitator dryer perfectly dries
vegetable remains for the food industry and
rejects from the paper industry.
Compost and other remains to be treated.
The machine to be constructed is always
matched to the material to be dried and
the customer’s requirements.
DIVERSE INDUSTRIAL BIOMASS
CONSTITUTES ANOTHER DRYING SEGMENT. The dried biomass provides you with a biological fertilizer for use on fields and gardens, due to the
ammonia being bound in the dryer when drying liquid manure and fermentation residue. If a chemical
exhaust air scrubber is installed downstream, this produces ammonium sulfate solution as a mineral
fertilizer. Dried sewage sludge can be incinerated with a higher calorific value.
FROM RESIDE TO
RAW MATERIAL
Performance data
* depending on the DM content and the air permeability of the material to be dried, the water flow temperature, outside temperature and
air humidity of the fresh air drawn in. ** in kW, excluding feed and discharge, multiplied by the respective number of hours of use
Evaporation performance per kWh used
 1.0 - 1.4 litres of water
RHINO®
CUSTOMER SERVICE
Bewa Beheer B.V., system for the production
of fertilizer from biomass, Moerdijk (NL) Loonbedrijf van Lin, plant for the industrial
drying of bulbs, Afferden (NL)
14 15
“If everyone here only knew
that RHINO exists...” (Industrial customer, 2018)
Phosphorus
 Fertilizer
Fuel ...
...is there when you
 needs him
Heat consumption
in kW*
Drying air volume
in m3
/h
ø Electrical energy
consumption
in kW**
75-210 9000 8
125-350 15000 14
175-490 21000 18
250-700 28000 33
RHINO® 3000
RHINO® 5000
RHINO® 7000
RHINO® 10000
Inspection:
Service, short response times, troubleshooting,
customized maintenance contracts
Repair:
Repairs, component replacement, modifications,
retrofitting
Training and Education:
At the customer site or upon request at RHS
headquarters
Revamping:
Modernization, performance enhancement, and
overhauling
Consulting:
Spare parts, consulting, innovations, process engineering advice, technical developments, remote control
via TeamViewer
16
RHS Maschinen- u. Anlagenbau GmbH
Harmate 42 | 48683 Ahaus, Germany
info@rhs-tech.de
www.rhs-tech.de
RHS – THE DRYING EXPERTS
EFFICIENT
POWERFUL
FAST
ROBUST
RHINO DRYING SYSTEMS –
A SUPERLATIVE IN DRYING
TECHNOLOGY!
We have been building machines since 2009,
and our RHINO dryers since 2013: agitating,
enduring, with superior efficiency – always
offering your business the opportunity for
major profit.
Get in touch with us!
Dated: 04.2025 2069-250173 EN
Important note: Despite careful checking,
we cannot accept liability for the
information and statements made here.
Made in Germany
Andreas Rensing
Managing Partner
Tel. +49(0)2561 /95 64 43 - 0
Ludger Heumer
Sales department
Tel. +49(0)2561 /95 64 43 - 21
DIN EN 3834 DIN EN 1090
